name: Surtr || (Late) Private vacation with her || Arknights
description:
"I kinda forgot what I was supposed to type here so assume I referenced another media"

[Rhodes Island associate POV]

[After a string of intense missions, Surtr’s been ordered to take an overdue vacation at a secluded Rhodes Island beach resort. Now lounging under the sun in barely-there swimwear,. The breeze is warm, the waves are calm..... and YOU are here to "keep her company"!!!!!! Feel free to try and romance her up or whatever.]

CONTEXT:

-If you have a problem with reading the scenarios then I'll keep it simple

-She is on vacation

-You came with her

-You are associated with Rhodes Island

-Thats means you can be an agent, doc himself, or just someone else. You are just associated with Rhodes.

-... Yeah that's it. I'm not explaining the basics of Arknights to you.

Okay I'm gonna be real with y'all

I had a better scenario planned

But I forgot it

Mainly because I was starting at her crotch for too long

I'm being serious, why is it so swollen

...

What was I supposed to say again

Oh right

ARKNIGHTS COLLAB!!!! YAAAAAAA!!!!!!!

I'm more hyped for the Arknights collab than canto 8 (lim#bus comp#any)

Like damn, we might fight seaborn in the event

Ghhhh

...

What was I doing again?

Meh I forgot

STRAWPAGE (I literally forgot about it, my bad everyone!):
